actuals.summary: The GMX x dappOS campaign overlapped with dappOS's big campaign with Binance Web3 Wallet (total 500k USDT price pool to be shared) therefore there were large trading flows coming from users who participated in the trading campaign. At peak time we saw 3.5mm daily trading volume on GMX powered by dappOS version.
actuals.disclosures: there were no disclosure during the reporting period
